title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Tsuru, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Jack as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The town is gonna be destroy- Ed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: You need to run away, O-TSURU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I didn't think he'd personally come here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it because of me...!? Did he come to execute me!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Atama- Yama thieves, retreat into the forest!! It's pointless to try and fight him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that a pretty strong thief has been hiding deep within the forests of Kuri...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fu hi hi hi h!!!! hicC!!..But that's enough about the past!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If you become my subordinate, HICO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll forgive you for your crimes... HICC!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm trying to stop your bleeding, so please don't move!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought it was weird that he would suddenly appear in Kuri....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't be able to escape in time....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Perhaps I should prepare for Battle!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The residents of Okobore Town are the Factory's workforce....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would some- what make sense if he was coming to set an example to warn the citizens, but... if he's drunk and goes on a careless rampage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think those guys in Okobore Town will be all right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fool....!! Think about the current situation. It's because you wanted to do something good!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Why didn't you tell me sooner, Kiku!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must head back. I will go save Tsuru!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I can't believe she didn't marry someone else to protect herself!! Even after 20 years!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you are looking for straw hat Luffy and Trafalfgar Law...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
